title: The Vanishing of the Mary Celeste

segments.text: In 1872, the merchant ship Mary Celeste was found adrift with no crew.
The vessel was in good condition, but its occupants had mysteriously vanished.
Theories about their fate range from mutiny to supernatural forces.
Despite several investigations, the truth remains elusive.
The Mary Celeste case continues to spark intrigue and theories.
A maritime mystery that defies explanation.
Follow for cases the world never forgot.

description: In 1872, the Mary Celeste was found abandoned at sea, and its crew was never seen again. Follow for daily cold cases! ⛵
